inputs.label: Variable Costs
inputs.businessContext: Total variable costs that vary with production volume.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total variable costs that vary with production volume.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim hacmine göre değişen toplam değişken maliyetler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Variable Gesamtkosten, die mit der Produktionsmenge variieren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts variables totaux qui varient avec le volume de production.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes variables totales que varían con el volumen de producción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي التكاليف المتغيرة التي تتغير مع حجم الإنتاج.

inputs.label: Fixed Operating Costs
inputs.businessContext: Fixed costs not dependent on production volume, such as rent, salaries.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed costs not dependent on production volume, such as rent, salaries.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim hacmine bağlı olmayan sabit maliyetler (kira, maaşlar gibi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Fixkosten, die nicht von der Produktionsmenge abhängen, z. B. Miete, Gehälter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts fixes indépendants du volume de production, tels que loyer, salaires.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes fijos independientes del volumen de producción, como alquiler, salarios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكاليف الثابتة غير المعتمدة على حجم الإنتاج، مثل الإيجار والرواتب.

businessContext_i18n.es: Pagos de intereses sobre la deuda.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
